scene.description: Interior of a red cable car cabin at night, moving over the Yeosu sea. The scene is viewed from inside the cabin, looking through the large window toward the dark sea and night sky.
must_include: interior of cable car cabin (walls, ceiling, window frame visible)
large window with night sea and sky view
single star visible in the night sky through the window
city lights and bridge visible through window
Sowoni standing inside the cabin facing the window

forbidden: exterior-only cable car view without character inside
landscape or scenery image without Sowoni present
hand-held star or star in character's hands
star resting on palm or fingers
seated or sitting pose for Sowoni
face visible from front or side
hair style or color change from shoulder-length dark hair

color.cablecar_interior: warm red with soft ambient light
color.star: single white/gold point with soft halo

star.position: visible through the window, in the night sky — NOT held by character
star.rule: star floats in sky. Never in hands, never on a surface, never touching the character.

character.name: Sowoni
character.appearance: shoulder-length dark hair, slim body, back view or slight 3/4 back only, no facial detail
character.pose: standing only — never sitting, never crouching
character.description: Sowoni stands quietly inside the cable car cabin, facing the window and looking toward the single star in the sky.
character.rule: Sowoni must be present inside the cabin. No star in hands. No mascot character.

composition.rule: character inside cabin — window frame — night sea — single star in sky
composition.flow: Sowoni (inside cabin) → window frame → dark sea → single star in sky
